title: NvmMetadata.label field needs doc comment pointing to label_str
description: nvm.rs line 58: NvmMetadata.label is a public [u8; 24] field with no doc comment. Round-1 issue wmp.26 asked for a doc comment on this field explaining NUL-padding semantics and directing readers to label_str(). The struct-level doc and nvm_overwrite parameter docs were updated, but the field itself still has no comment. A contributor who accesses .label directly has no indication that (a) it is NUL-padded (not a Rust str), (b) the field may have no NUL if all 24 bytes are used, or (c) that label_str() exists for safe UTF-8 access. Add a /// doc comment on the label field.
